case_title: DORIAN ESTELA VS. FRANK CASTALDINI et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTELA, DORIAN SERVED JAN-15-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTALDINI, FRANK
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-23-2012.
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY DEFENDANT CASTALDINI, FRANK

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT FRANK CASTALDINI'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM JUDGMENT AND TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO FILE REQUEST FOR TRIAL DE NOVO IS DENIED. THE DECLARATION OF MR. ERB FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT TO WARRANT DISCRETIONARY RELIEF UNDER CCP 473, CCP 1141.23, AND CRC 3.828. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: PAULA SHI #13358.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Judgment And To Allow Defendant To File Request For Trial De Novo
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Courtney Cassinelli, Esq., 415.576.1500, for plaintiff Dorian Estela.
Jonathan Erb, Esq., 415.225.6838, for defendant Frank Castaldini.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT FRANK CASTALDINI's Motion For Relief From Judgment And To Allow Defendant To File Request For Trial De Novo is denied. The declaration of Mr. Erb fails to demonstrate mistake, inadvertence, or excusable neglect to warrant discretionary relief under CCP 473, CCP 1141.23, and CRC 3.828. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Paula Shi #13358.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

The Order to Show Cause is re-set Feb-25-2014 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. Judge Cynthia Lee presiding. Proceedings not reported. (610)
